items.title: Family violence an 'unfortunate reality' as police attend to 160 call-outs in a week in Melbourne suburb
items.summary: Police say a man who threatened to kill his wife with a hammer and tried to set fire to a property was just one of dozens of arrests for family violence in a single week in Melbourne's south-east last month.
